blocks.text: Required before a CLI migration PR is mergeable:

blocks.code:
go test ./...
go list -m all
go build ./cmd/riido
go run ./cmd/riido --help
go run ./cmd/riido bridge providers

blocks.text: Architecture-doc migration PRs must also pass:

blocks.code:
test -f docs/30-architecture/cli-surface.md
go test ./...
go build -o /tmp/riido ./cmd/riido
go run ./cmd/riido --help
go run ./cmd/riido bridge providers

blocks.text: RIID-4686 adds a fake-local-socket mwsd/project gate for `riido mwsd projection` and `riido mwsd sync`. RIID-4690 restores focused daemon lifecycle checks:
Commands that need a daemon, mwsd socket, provider CLI, or local app state must be black-box smoke tests with explicit skip conditions.
